name: Overview_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Overview_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis;

name: Exploration1_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration1_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.cltv, Payment_Info.total_revenue, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Payment_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id;

name: Exploration2_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration2_View AS SELECT Location_Data.customer_id, Location_Data.latitude, Location_Data.longitude, Location_Data.total_population, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Location_Data JOIN Status_Analysis ON Location_Data.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id WHERE Location_Data.state = 'California';

name: Exploration3_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration3_View AS SELECT Service_Options.customer_id, Service_Options.internet_type, Payment_Info.contract, Payment_Info.payment_method, Payment_Info.monthly_charges, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Service_Options JOIN Payment_Info ON Service_Options.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

name: Detail_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Detail_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.gender, Customer_Info.dependents, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;
